title: 24 Pack Glitter Gold Berries Stems,Artificial Glitter Gold Berry Picks Holly Red Berries Branches Christmas Berry Stem Picks for Christmas Tree Wedding Holiday Season Winter Home Decoration(19 CM )
features: WHAT YOU GET:Each package contains 24 pcs artificial glitter gold berry picks faux berry christmas berry stems gold berry sprigs twigs. Each sprig has 15 glitter gold berries.The length of each berry stem is about 19cm.The glitter gold berry has a diameter of approximately 1.5cm. They look lifelike, bright and attractive.

CLASSIC DESIGN:The berries are bright glitter gold in color and the stems have a burgundy tone, which will add rich colors and beautiful details to any floral arrangement.Perfect Christmas tree decor, the artificial glitter gold berries are great for decorating your Christmas tree, increasing Christmas atmosphere.

RELIABLE MATERIAL: Artificial glitter gold berries are made from high quality silk ,iron wire, foam ball.The foam berries are covered with a glossy lacquer coating. The berry twigs are resting on the main stem that is designed with inner wire and wrapped with brown floral tape. You can easily shape and arrange them to your liking.

CHRISTMAS DECOR:Perfect for Christmas tree, Christmas wreaths, Christmas garland, floral arrangement, bouquet, holiday table centerpiece, table arrangement, gift embellishment, mantel decoration, holiday display, Christmas party decoration, and so on. They will add a bit of vitality to your decorative projects.

WIDELY USE:Beautiful glitter gold berries stems are perfect for Christmas table decorations, holiday, home, party, wedding, also good for DIY Christmas crafts.These red holly Christmas berries are aslo good for Christmas decorations, Christmas tree ornaments.These vivid red berry cuttings will add a festive atmosphere.
description: 🍒Get into the spirit of Christmas! Beautiful Colors Warm Up Your Home. If you're looking to spruce up the entryway, cozy up those indoor plants, or add some vibrant color to the centerpiece on your dining table, this glitter gold berries stems helps bring the color of the nature right into your home! 🍒 Specifications: 🍒Length: 19 cm for each glitter gold berry stem 🍒Quantity: 24 pieces 🍒Color: Glitter Gold 🍒Material: Copper wire/silk/plastic 🍒Package Includes: 24 x Artificial Glitter Gold Berry Picks Features: 🍒The glitter gold berry with stems are perfect home decor to decorate your bedrooms, parlors, dining rooms, courtyard, or any places you want to place them. 🍒Bring the outdoors in, and let this sweet artificial berry spray grant your home a warm and inviting, crafty woodland charm for you and your guests. 🍒DIY arts crafts project like red berry wreath, red berry garland, red berry branches, Christmas wreaths, rustic wreath or other handcrafts with these cute berries. 🍒Perfect Christmas tree decor, the artificial glitter gold berries are great for decorating your -Christmas tree, increasing Christmas atmosphere. 🍒Red holly berry is beautiful prop for Christmas decorations, arts and crafts DIY, cake toppers, wedding favor, photo props, and various occasions required. Tips: 🍒 Be careful with your hands, avoid scratching by wire!
